steps.name: I navigate to the login page
I enter username "test_email@12taste.com"
I enter password "test_email@12taste.com"
I click on the login button
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate to the addresses page

elements.name: Verify addresses page loads with billing and shipping sections

steps.name: I should see billing address section
I should see shipping address section
I should see edit billing address link
I should see edit shipping address link
I navigate to the login page
I enter username "test_email@12taste.com"
I enter password "test_email@12taste.com"
I click on the login button
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate to the addresses page
I click on edit billing address link
I should be on billing address page
I clear and enter billing first name "Dev"
I clear and enter billing last name "Tester"
I clear and enter billing company "Test Company"
I select billing country "CH"
I clear and enter billing street address "123 Test Street"
I clear and enter billing city "Chennai"
I select billing state "AG"
I clear and enter billing postcode "1000 AA"
I clear and enter billing phone "9876543210"
I clear and enter billing email "test_email@12taste.com"
I click save address button

result.error_message:

steps.name: I click on edit shipping address link
I should be on shipping address page
I clear and enter shipping first name "Testing"
I clear and enter shipping last name "Purpose"
I clear and enter shipping company "Test Company"
I select shipping country "CH"
I clear and enter shipping street address "123 Test Street"
I clear and enter shipping city "Chennai"
I select shipping state "AG"
I clear and enter shipping postcode "1000 AA"
I click save address button
I should see address saved success message
I navigate to the login page
I enter username "test_email@12taste.com"
I enter password "test_email@12taste.com"
I click on the login button
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate to the addresses page
